why: CHART: price broke down out of the morning 7575-7597 range, cracking below 7575 to 7573; momentum accelerating down (5-min -0.18%, steepest of day), below VWAP-proxy 7587.8, clean lower lows 7590>7582>7576>7573. GEX CONFIRM: negative-gamma regime (levels break/moves extend), net near-spot going more negative -95M (dealers accelerate), 7575 barney now flipped to overhead resistance, air pocket down to growing 7555 pika floor (+30M, 1mDelta+2.5). Chart thesis + GEX aligned short toward 7555.

CHART: continuation thesis stalled — day-low/open 7563.63 held as support, price bounced off 7565 to 7569.6 (green candle), 5-min momentum flipped positive +0.01%. Favorable move peaked +0.11% (spot 7565) and gave back over half to +0.05%. Clean breakdown leg 7573>7565 already captured. GEX: floor at 7540 now shrinking (1mDelta-1.8), 7575 barney overhead intact but downside fuel spent near-term. Cap the 0DTE winner, do not round-trip.

CHART: 3-hour range low 7580.5 finally broke after ~6 holds — 13:40 candle closed 7578.9 below the floor, price grinding down not bouncing, below VWAP 7585, LH structure now breaking to lower lows. Transition OUT of the coil = where 0DTE moves. GEX CONFIRM: extreme negative gamma net -137M (dealers amplify moves), enormous 7575 barney (-104M) just below acting as downside magnet, 7600 ceiling faded to -41M (upside capped), target the growing 7560 pika floor (+40.5M). Short toward 7575>7560.

CHART: breakdown stalled — price coiled at 7576-7577 for ~15 min (13:40-13:54), the massive 7575 barney (-108M) held firm as support, momentum dead flat (5-min -0.01%), continuation to 7560 never came. GEX: barney refuses to pierce, acting as floor. Short +~2.2 pts but stalled 0DTE bleeds theta and risks a bounce to VWAP 7585. Cap the small winner, do not round-trip, stay ready for a cleaner final-hour trade.

CHART: the all-day negative-gamma pin RELEASED downward — 14:45 candle dropped ~8pts (7581>7573) breaking VWAP 7583.7 AND the 7575 barney together, 14:50 continued lower (no bounce), momentum accelerating (15-min -0.12%). Late-day breakdown = moves extend into close. GEX CONFIRM: 7575 barney flipped to overhead resistance (-113M), net negative gamma -146M, floor 7560 exploded to +69.2M (largest pika floor of day = magnet pulling price down). Short toward the 7560 floor zone.

CHART: continuation FAILED — price reclaimed the 7575 barney (15:00 candle bounced hard 7570.9>7575.9, +5pt green), 5-min momentum flipped positive +0.05%, now 7575.9 above the level. Short went red ~2.7pts adverse. GEX: 7560 floor magnet dissipating fast (1mDelta-5.1), new 7580 barney formed overhead. Hit my tight-leash invalidation (reclaim 7575). Pin release faked out and reversed — cut the loss per discipline, do not hope for a comeback.
